scenarios.title: LLM Fine-Tuning, Training, and Serving Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Transformers model usage, local generation, fine-tuning, serving CLIs, PEFT adapters, LlamaFactory/Axolotl/ms-swift training, vLLM/SGLang/LMDeploy serving, BentoML model services, and LLM deployment.
scenarios.role: Use and extend Hugging Face Transformers for inference, generation, training, tokenizers/processors, serving CLI, quantization/integrations, and contributor workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `transformers` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: generation, inference pipelines, model extension, quantization integrations, serving cli, and 2 other focused workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `transformers` when the request names `transformers`, centers on inference, generation, training, tokenizers/processors, serving CLI, quantization/integrations, and contributor workflows, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in llm finetuning training serving workflows. Then route to generation, inference pipelines, model extension, or quantization integrations when those focused workflows match.
